ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject abbreviation (e.g., AAS, MATH, ENGL) */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Course number (e.g., 100, 200, 300) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "credit_hours" REAL /* Number of credit hours for the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisite courses */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  "course_format" TEXT /* Format of the course (e.g., online, in-person, hybrid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course this section belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the section is offered */,
  "term" TEXT /* Term the section is offered (e.g., Spring, Fall) */,
  "section_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the section (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  "crn" INTEGER /* Course Registration Number (CRN) */,
  "section_title" TEXT /* Title of the section (if different from the course title) */,
  "section_credit_hours" REAL /* Number of credit hours for the section (if different from the course) */,
  "section_status" TEXT /* Status of the section (e.g., A - Active, C - Canceled) */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Enrollment status of the section (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "section_type" TEXT /* Type of section (e.g., online, in-person, hybrid) */,
  "type_code" TEXT /* Code for the section type */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the section */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the section */,
  "days_of_week" TEXT /* Days of the week the section meets */,
  "room" TEXT /* Room where the section meets */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building where the section meets */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the section */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the section */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* Current number of students enrolled in the section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the instructor (e.g., Dr., Prof.) */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major the student is pursuing */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of study (e.g., 1, 2, 3, 4) */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Current GPA of the student */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advisor for the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the section */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Enrollment status (e.g., Registered, Dropped) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id", "student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "degrees" (
  "degree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each degree */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the degree */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the degree */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the degree */,
  "total_credit_hours" INTEGER /* Total credit hours required for the degree */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("degree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_degrees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "degree_requirements" (
  "degree_id" INTEGER /* ID of the degree */,
  "requirement" TEXT /* Specific requirement for the degree (e.g., course, GPA, credit hours) */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course fulfilling the requirement */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Credit hours required for the requirement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("degree_id", "requirement"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_degree_requirements_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_degrees" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "degree_id" INTEGER /* ID of the degree the student is pursuing */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the student's degree progress (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id", "degree_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "chairperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chairperson of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classrooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classroom */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building where the classroom is located */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the classroom */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id")
)
